title: senecio fistulosus var. ochroleucus
intro: Senecio fistulosus var. ochroleucus, also known as Yellow Ragwort, is a variety of the Ragwort plant, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as treating conditions like gout, arthritis, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function. In herbal preparations, Yellow Ragwort is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, with some practitioners also recommending its use in salves and topical creams for skin conditions like eczema and acne.
